source_title: Stellaris 4.4.4 patch released (5505) - official Steam news
key_claims_supported: 4.4.4 public patch availability on Steam/GOG/MS Store; Nomads fixes; AI/UI/performance/stability/modding changes; save-backup caution.
reliability_notes: Primary official source; Steam oldnews page aggregates multiple Stellaris announcements.

source_title: Stellaris 4.4.5 "Pegasus" Early Open Beta notes - official Steam news
source_type: Official beta patch notes / Steam news
key_claims_supported: 4.4.5 is opt-in stellaris_test beta; minimal QA warning; Resource Abundance slider; Operational Reserves and Nomads balance changes.
reliability_notes: Primary official source; beta content is explicitly still in development.

source_title: Stellaris Dev Diary #427 - 4.5 Cygnus Open Beta context
key_claims_supported: 4.5 Cygnus is an early beta with tentative experimental changes; further beta updates expected during July.
reliability_notes: Primary official source; not a stable-branch claim.

source_title: Paradox launches Nomads and 4.4 Pegasus
key_claims_supported: Nomads and free 4.4 Pegasus released on PC; Arkships, Wayline Networks, contracts, origins, Stellar Cannon, Champion’s Forge Live; free update includes war-joining/leaving, job-system improvements, Situation Log UI, performance and bug fixes.
reliability_notes: Primary official launch source.

source_title: Stellaris Steam Store page
key_claims_supported: Recent review score 72% positive from 982 recent reviews; Steam Workshop feature; expansion subscription; store DLC list; base package/bundle context.
reliability_notes: Primary store data; review counts/percentages are time-sensitive snapshots.

source_title: PC Gamer: Stellaris Nomads impressions/review feature
key_claims_supported: Reviewer enjoyed Arkship/Nomads fantasy; Wayline logistics and Operational Reserves were criticized as confusing/rough.
reliability_notes: Opinion/sentiment source, not factual authority on patch state.

source_title: Output Lag: Stellaris Nomads Review
key_claims_supported: 7.8/10 review; praised Nomads as conceptually daring and mobile-Arkship play as fresh.
reliability_notes: Opinion/sentiment source; lower authority than official patch notes.

source_title: Reddit thread: UI Overhaul Dynamic 4.4.4 crash report
key_claims_supported: Community report of UIOD diplomacy-screen crash before the main mod’s July 3 update; beta plugin suggested as workaround.
reliability_notes: Single community report; treated as transient signal, not a confirmed current defect after July 3 workshop update.

source_title: Chinese Steam Workshop collection note on 4.4 compatibility disruption
key_claims_supported: Community-maintained collection warned that 4.4 split colony/planet logic for Arkship economy and would cause major adaptation work for mods.
reliability_notes: Community inference; useful as modder-sentiment/context, not official.

source_title: Irony Mod Manager website

source_title: GitHub organization: CWTools
key_claims_supported: CWTools provides parser/editing/validation library, VS Code language server, GitHub Action and game configs, including Stellaris config activity.

source_title: Visual Studio Marketplace: CWTools - Paradox Language Services
key_claims_supported: CWTools VS Code supports Stellaris and provides Paradox scripting support; extension says preview and recommends backups.

source_title: CWTools get started page

source_title: GitHub: cwtools-action
key_claims_supported: CWTools Action uses CWTools .NET library and CWTools.CLI for automated PDXScript analysis with validation rules and vanilla cache.

source_title: Valve Developer Community: SteamCMD
key_claims_supported: SteamCMD is Valve’s command-line Steam client used to install/update server content; can be used with workshop_download_item in SteamCMD workflows.
reliability_notes: Official Valve wiki; page fetch limited by 403 in session, search result used for metadata.

source_title: GitHub: Paradoxos Mod Manager
key_claims_supported: Paradoxos is Java mod manager for several Paradox games including Stellaris, with Windows/Linux/macOS requirements.
reliability_notes: Legacy tool; superseded by rework/launchers.

source_title: GitHub: Paradoxos Mod Manager Rework
key_claims_supported: Rework README warns it is incompatible with Paradox Launcher playset system and launcher can erase activated mods.
reliability_notes: Strong avoidance signal for modern playset workflow.

source_title: Steam Community: Stellaris Mod Manager thread

reliability_notes: Older but useful for maintenance-status history.
